top_findings.summary: The skill description states a specific primary purpose: "Browser automation for ChatGPT Plus and Gemini Advanced web interfaces." However, the provided documentation (EXAMPLES.md, REFERENCE.md, README.md) reveals a general-purpose browser automation tool capable of performing arbitrary actions on ANY website (e.g., e-commerce scraping, form filling, performance testing, downloading files, cookie extraction). This represents significant permission overreach beyond the stated purpose of interacting with two specific AI web interfaces. The tool requests full browser control (navigation, clicks, typing, screenshot capture, cookie access, file downloads) that could be used to access sensitive user data or perform actions on unrelated websites without clear user intent alignment with the stated goal.
